title: This Championship season has been utterly ridiculo...
summary: England's Championship, already known as the world's most competitive second-tier league, has proven particularly memorable this season with exceptional competitiveness and drama.
content: They say the Championship is the world's most competitive league, but even by its standard, this season in England's second tier has been memorable.

zh.title: 本赛季英冠联赛绝对令人瞠目结舌
zh.summary: 英冠作为世界竞争最激烈的第二级联赛，本赛季格外令人难忘，展现了卓越的竞争力和戏剧性。

title: Revisiting ESPN's 39 U21 men's lists: Who flopped?...
summary: ESPN has published annual lists of the world's best soccer players aged 21 and under for eight years; this article revisits previous selections to assess which young stars lived up to expectations.
content: For eight years, ESPN has brought you a list of the game's next young stars aged 21 or under. But what has happened to some of the players from years gone by?

zh.title: 重温ESPN的21岁以下球员名单：谁表现不佳？
zh.summary: ESPN在过去八年中每年都发布世界最佳21岁以下足球运动员名单；本文回顾了以往的选择，评估了哪些年轻球星是否符合预期。

title: Clásico kits: Barcelona, Real Madrid's all-time be...
summary: Barcelona and Real Madrid, the two teams that contest the famous El Clásico, have worn iconic kits throughout their history alongside some controversial and memorable designs.
content: El Clásico is a clash of two of the world's most recognizable teams, Barcelona and Real Madrid. Both have iconic kits and shocking shirts in their closets.

zh.title: 德比球衣：巴塞罗那、皇家马德里的历史经典
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那和皇家马德里是争夺著名德比的两支球队，他们在历史上穿过许多标志性的球衣，同时也有一些有争议和难忘的设计。

title: The inside story of how Manchester City won the WS...
summary: Manchester City dominated the Women's Super League championship; the article explores the tactical and strategic factors that led to their decisive victory.
content: Manchester City have dominated the Women's Super League and are worthy champions, but what were the keys to their success?

zh.title: 曼城女足如何赢得女超联赛冠军的内幕故事
zh.summary: 曼城主宰了女超联赛冠军赛;该文章探讨了导致其决定性胜利的战术和战略因素。

title: Total recall: PSG backs up best team in world talk...
summary: Paris Saint-Germain coach Luis Enrique claimed his team is the best in the world after they defeated Bayern Munich 6-5 on aggregate to reach the Champions League final against Arsenal.
content: Luis Enrique said there was no better team than his Paris Saint-Germain side after the reigning European champions booked a Champions League final clash against Arsenal with a 6-5 aggregate semifinal win against Bayern Munich.

zh.title: 言行一致:巴黎圣日耳曼用行动证明自己是世界最强球队
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼主教练路易斯·恩里克声称他的球队是世界最强的,在他们以6-5的总比分击败拜仁慕尼黑后进入欧冠决赛对阵阿森纳。

title: Kompany points to Bayern progress after UCL exit
summary: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany emphasized positive developments in the team's campaign despite their Champions League semifinal elimination by PSG.
content: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany attempted to focus on the positives of Bayern Munich's Champions League campaign after they bowed out in the semifinals to Paris Saint-Germain on Wednesday.

zh.title: 康帕尼指出拜仁在欧冠出局后的进步
zh.summary: 尽管拜仁慕尼黑在欧冠半决赛中被巴黎圣日耳曼淘汰,但主教练文森特·康帕尼强调了球队在本赛季的积极发展。

title: Mexico: Liga MX players late to camp out of WC
summary: Mexico's national soccer federation threatened to exclude Liga MX-based players from World Cup roster consideration if they are late to a mandatory training camp.
content: Mexico has threatened to leave Liga MX-based players out of contention for the World Cup roster if they are late to a training camp that begins on Wednesday night.

zh.title: 墨西哥：美洲联赛球员迟到出局世界杯风险
zh.summary: 墨西哥足协威胁，如果美洲联赛球员迟到参加强制集训营，将被排除在世界杯名单考虑之外。

title: Man City promise bright 'future' after sealing WSL...
summary: Manchester City won their first Women's Super League title since 2016, with coach Andree Jeglertz expressing optimism about the team's future prospects.
content: Manchester City head coach Andree Jeglertz said he was excited for the future after they were crowned Women's Super League champions for the first time since 2016.

zh.title: 曼城赢得英超女子组冠军后承诺光明未来
zh.summary: 曼城赢得自2016年以来首个英超女子组冠军，教练安德雷·耶格勒茨对球队的未来前景表示乐观。

title: Sources: Key players must exit for Barça rebuild
summary: Barcelona must sell key players including Ferran Torres, Jules Koundé, or Raphinha to generate funds for the new signings requested by coach Hansi Flick.
content: Barcelona must raise money through the departure of important players such as Ferran Torres, Jules Koundé or even Raphinha to be able to re-invest in the new signings coach Hansi Flick has requested this summer, various sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：关键球员必须离队才能完成巴萨重建
zh.summary: 巴萨必须出售包括费兰·托雷斯、朱尔·孔德或拉菲尼亚等关键球员，以筹集资金用于主教练汉西·弗利克要求的新引援。

title: Amad: Every Man Utd player happy with Carrick
summary: Manchester United forward Amad Diallo says the entire squad would welcome Michael Carrick continuing as head coach into next season.
content: Amad Diallo has said everyone in the Manchester United dressing room would be happy to see Michael Carrick stay on as head coach next season.

zh.title: 阿马德：曼联所有球员都支持卡里克
zh.summary: 曼联前锋阿马德·迪亚洛表示，整个球队都欢迎迈克尔·卡里克在下个赛季继续担任主教练。

title: FIFA prez: WC tickets priced at U.S. market rate
summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino defended controversial World Cup ticket pricing, dismissing concerns despite resales of final tickets exceeding $2 million.
content: FIFA president Gianni Infantino has again defended high ticket prices for this summer's World Cup and brushed off tickets being resold for the final at a cost of more than $2 million.

zh.title: FIFA主席：世界杯门票按美国市价定价
zh.summary: FIFA主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺为有争议的世界杯门票定价进行了辩护，尽管决赛门票转售价格超过200万美元，但他驳回了这些顾虑。

title: FIFA extends Prestianni ban to World Cup matches
summary: FIFA extended Gianluca Prestianni's global ban to cover two World Cup matches in the United States if the Benfica winger is selected for Argentina.
content: FIFA confirmed a global ban Wednesday for Gianluca Prestianni that will rule the Benfica winger out of two FIFA World Cup games in the United States if he is selected in Argentina's squad.

zh.title: FIFA将普雷斯蒂亚尼禁赛扩展至世界杯比赛
zh.summary: FIFA将詹卢卡·普雷斯蒂亚尼的全球禁赛范围扩大到美国的两场世界杯比赛，如果这位本菲卡边锋被阿根廷选中的话。

title: PSG are on brink of greatness if they can win Cham...
summary: PSG convincingly defeated Bayern Munich in the Champions League semifinal and faces Arsenal in the final, seeking back-to-back European titles.
content: PSG handled Bayern Munich with ease in Wednesday's semifinal second leg, and now have a shot at a second straight UEFA Champions League. Can Arsenal realistically stop them?

zh.title: 巴黎圣日耳曼若赢得欧冠将处于伟大的边缘
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼在欧冠半决赛中以压倒性胜利击败拜仁慕尼黑，并将在决赛中对阵阿森纳，寻求连续两年赢得欧洲冠军。

title: VAR review: Why weren't PSG penalized for apparent...
summary: Despite Bayern Munich's handball appeals, PSG avoided VAR sanctions on the disputed incidents; the article examines whether the correct decisions were made.
content: Despite Bayern's appeals for handball, PSG avoided sanctions on both. Were the right calls made?

zh.title: 视频助理裁判回顾：为什么巴黎圣日耳曼没有因明显的手球被罚
zh.summary: 尽管拜仁慕尼黑提出手球申诉，巴黎圣日耳曼还是避免了对争议事件的视频助理裁判处罚；该文章审视了是否做出了正确的判决。
